scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build && pnpm run build:frontend && rm -rf dist && cp -R anra-workspace/frontend/dist dist
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.build:frontend: npm --prefix anra-workspace/frontend ci && npm --prefix anra-workspace/frontend run build
